recommendations.title: Zombie Flesh Eaters 2
recommendations.overview: When a terrorist's body, infected with a stolen chemical, is recovered by the US military, the corpse is cremated, unintentionally releasing a virus and bacteria into the atmosphere over a small island.

recommendations.title: The Forsaken
recommendations.overview: A young man is in a race against time as he searches for a cure after becoming infected with a virus that will eventually turn him into a blood-sucking vampire.

recommendations.title: Return of the Living Dead Part II
recommendations.overview: A group of kids discover one of the drums containing a rotting corpse and release the 2-4-5 Trioxin gas into the air, causing the dead to once again rise from the grave and seek out brains.

recommendations.title: Home Again
recommendations.overview: Life for a single mom in Los Angeles takes an unexpected turn when she allows three young guys to move in with her.

recommendations.title: Infection

recommendations.title: Cargo
recommendations.overview: After being infected in the wake of a violent pandemic and with only 48 hours to live, a father struggles to find a new home for his baby daughter.

recommendations.title: Turbulence

recommendations.title: 28 Days Later
recommendations.overview: Twenty-eight days after a killer virus was accidentally unleashed from a British research facility, a small group of London survivors are caught in a desperate struggle to protect themselves from the infected. Carried by animals and humans, the virus

recommendations.title: Pandemic
recommendations.overview: After a virus of epic proportions overwhelms the planet—with more infected than uninfected—humanity is losing its grip on survival and its only hope is finding a cure and keeping the infected contained. Lauren, a doctor, arrives in Los Angeles with h

recommendations.title: Cut Off
recommendations.overview: A coroner finds a capsule in the head of a heavily mutilated corpse, containing a phone number and single word: the name of his daughter.
